name: Osomatsu-kun
overview: The adventures of Iyami, a con artist who's always looking for a quick buck, and Chibita, his short-statured kid partner-in-crime, as they make trouble for their town and constantly cause friction with the Matsuno sextuplets, a clan of rowdy identical 10-year-old brothers led by the eldest, Osomatsu.

trailers.title: Osomatsu-kun (1988): The OP in 1080p HD and Stereo (with English Subtitles)
